name: HUBSPOT INC
summary: HubSpot provides an agentic customer platform for marketing, sales, and customer service teams. Its platform includes AI-powered engagement Hubs (Marketing, Sales, Service, Operations, Content, Commerce), a Smart CRM, and a connected ecosystem with integrations, templates, and an academy. The company targets mid-market B2B companies with 2–2,000 employees, primarily selling on a subscription basis. In 2025, HubSpot generated $3.1 billion in total revenue and served 288,706 customers across 135+ countries.

products.name: Marketing Hub
products.description: AI-powered marketing engagement hub for attracting and converting prospects via SEO, AEO, email, social, and automation.

products.name: Sales Hub
products.description: Sales engagement hub supporting deal progression, prospecting, and data enrichment.

products.name: Service Hub
products.description: Customer service hub with support ticketing, knowledge base, and conversation routing.

products.name: Operations Hub
products.description: Operations engagement hub for managing and governing business processes.

products.name: Content Hub
products.description: Content management hub with AI-powered content creation, web content, blogging, and video hosting.

products.name: Commerce Hub
products.description: End-to-end commerce solution with AI-powered CPQ, automated billing, and payment processing.

products.name: Smart CRM
products.description: Foundational CRM combining customer data with AI to provide unified customer profiles and business process tools.

products.name: AI Agents
products.description: AI teammates that research accounts, enrich data, answer support questions, and qualify leads.
